nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Masked water tyrant
nodes.summary: Masked water tyrant（Masked water tyrant，学名 Fluvicola nengeta），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于卡尔·林奈，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 卡尔·林奈
nodes.summary: 卡尔·林奈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联115种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、角叫鴨、白臉樹鴨等115种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The masked water tyrant (Fluvicola nengeta) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and as a vagrant to Uruguay and Paraguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: | title =The Birds of Ecuador: Field Guide | publisher =Cornell University Press | volume = II| date =2001 | location =Ithaca | pages =516–517 | isbn =978-0-8014-8721-7 }} The masked water tyrant inhabits somewhat open shrublands near freshwater bodies, and especially favors marshy areas and rice fields

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It also occurs on the banks of ponds, lakes, streams, and rivers and occasionally is found in nearby open grasslands
